owner.name: Amanah
owner.description: Autonomous, compliant RWA treasury agent on Casper. Proof, not a diary: every AI decision is Ed25519-signed and verified on-chain by the contract itself; a K-of-N quorum of independent auditor agents must approve each move (APPROVE/VETO) on-chain; KYC and proof-of-reserves are zero-knowledge; on-chain circuit breakers bench a misbehaving or silent agent; principal is locked and spending is custodian-gated.
